items.alt: WOOKTOOL tape measure assembly line for OEM measuring tape production in China
items.title: Tape Measure Assembly Line
items.description: Assembly line for WOOKTOOL tape measures, supporting OEM logo, case color, blade length, hook, clip, strap, and packaging requirements for B2B buyers.

items.alt: WOOKTOOL measuring tape assembly workshop for wholesale tape measure production
items.title: Bulk Measuring Tape Production
items.description: Workshop view for bulk tape measure orders, helping importers, wholesalers, distributors, and private-label tool brands plan stable repeat supply.

items.alt: custom mold workshop for OEM hand tool and tape measure shell development
items.title: Custom Mold Workshop
items.description: Custom mold capability for tape measure shells and OEM hand tool parts, suitable for buyers developing new products, private-label designs, and exclusive tooling.

items.alt: WOOKTOOL tape measure quality inspection for blade printing assembly and product control
items.title: Quality Inspection
items.description: Quality control area for checking tape blade printing, assembly condition, product appearance, function, packaging details, and buyer-specific inspection standards.

items.alt: testing equipment room for WOOKTOOL hand tool quality control and product development
items.title: Testing Equipment
items.description: Testing equipment and workshop support for product development, sampling, material checks, durability review, and production quality control.

items.alt: WOOKTOOL packing and shipping warehouse for export hand tool orders
items.title: Packing and Shipping
items.description: Packing and shipping area for export hand tool orders, including carton handling, warehouse preparation, shipment coordination, and delivery planning.
